DataHub includes pre-defined mapping templates which allow users to export data between MagicDraw with SysML plugin, Cameo Requirements+, and IBM Rational DOORS. Other MagicDraw profiles are also supported including CBM, UPDM DoDAF, and any custom profile.

1 SoaML profile 16.8 need to be installed. 
2 SoaML profile 16.9 need to be installed. 
3 SoaML profile 17.0.1 need to be installed. The integration with ModelPro from [ModelDriven.org](http://ModelDriven.org) is not supported. 
4 SoaML profile 17.0.2 need to be installed. The integration with ModelPro from [ModelDriven.org](http://ModelDriven.org) is not supported.

**Notes:**

1 tested with Mathematica version 7.0 
2 For core solver, it requires either Mathematica 8.0, OpenModelica 1.7.0, or MATLAB Symbolic Math Toolbox R2010b. Mathematica 7.0 and OpenModelica 1.5 are not supported 
3 A core solver is required, either Mathematica 8.0, OpenModelica 1.7 or 1.8, or MATLAB Symbolic Math Toolbox R2010b. Simulink R2010b and MS Excel 2003, 2007, 2010 are optional. 
4 ParaMagic 18.0 Lite requires MagicDraw and SysML plugin 17.0.5 and higher (including 18.0). A core solver is required. Options are: PlayerPro (9.0), Mathematica (9.0), OpenModelica (1.9), or MATLAB Symbolic Math Toolbox (R2014a).

SysML plugin needs to be installed.

3 tested with Mathematica versions 6.0 and 7.0. Mathematica 5.2 is not supported anymore. 
4 tested with Mathematica version 7.0 
5 For core solver, ParaMagic requires either Mathematica 8.0, OpenModelica 1.7.0, or MATLAB Symbolic Math Toolbox R2010b. Mathematica 7.0 and OpenModelica 1.5 are not supported. 
6 A core solver is required, either Mathematica 8.0, OpenModelica 1.7 or 1.8, or MATLAB Symbolic Math Toolbox R2010b. Simulink R2010b and MS Excel 2003, 2007, 2010 are optional. 
7 ParaMagic 18.0 requires MagicDraw and SysML plugin 17.0.5 and higher (including 18.0). A core solver is required. Options are: PlayerPro (9.0), Mathematica (9.0), OpenModelica (1.9), or MATLAB Symbolic Math Toolbox (R2014a).

SysML plugin needs to be installed.

ParaMagic™ requires Mathematica for math solving. 
 
[Click here to see the ParaMagic plugin description.](http://www.nomagic.com/products/magicdraw-addons/paramagic-plugin.html)

**Notes:** 
DataHub includes pre-defined mapping templates which allow users to export data between MagicDraw with SysML plugin, Cameo Requirements+, Rational RequisitePro, and IBM Rational DOORS. Other MagicDraw profiles are also supported including CBM, UPDM DoDAF, and any custom profile. 
 
[Click here to see the Cameo DataHub description.](http://www.nomagic.com/products/cameo-datahub.html)

##### Floating License Server

**Notes:** 
As of v16.8, FlexNet license server is used to manage [floating licenses](https://docs.nomagic.com/support/sales-and-licenses/floating-licensing). FlexNet License Server is compatible with v16.8 (and later) client applications.

Simulink� R2010b and MS Excel� 2003, 2007, 2010 are optional. <br /><sup>7</sup> ParaMagic� 18.0 requires MagicDraw and SysML plugin 17.0.5 and higher (including 18.0). A core solver is required. Options are: PlayerPro (9.0), Mathematica (9.0), OpenModelica (1.9), or MATLAB Symbolic Math Toolbox (R2014a).</p><p>SysML plugin needs to be installed.</p><p style="text-align: right;"><ac:link Rational DOORS. ##### Cameo DataHub plugin

| Cameo DataHub plugin version | 2021x | 2021x Refresh1 | 2021x Refresh2 |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Enterprise Business Transformation version | 2024x Refresh1 |  |  |  |
| Magic Cyber Systems Engineer version | 2021x | X |  |  |
| 2021x Refresh1 |  | X |  |  |
| 2021x Refresh2 |  |  | X |  |

| 2021x Refresh1 |  | X |  |  |
| 2021x Refresh2 |  |  | X |  |

**Notes:** 
DataHub includes pre-defined mapping templates which allow users to exchange data between MagicDraw with the SysML plugin, IBM Rational DOORS, Enovia TRM, and JAMA Connect. Other MagicDraw profiles are also supported, including CBM, UPDM, DoDAF, and any custom profile. 
 
[Click here to see the Cameo DataHub description.](http://www.nomagic.com/products/cameo-datahub.html)

##### Cameo DataHub plugin

| Cameo DataHub plugin version | 2021x | 2021x Refresh1 | 2021x Refresh2 |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| MagicDraw version | 2021x | X |  |  |
| 2021x Refresh1 |  | X |  |  |
| 2021x Refresh2 |  |  | X |  |

| 2021x Refresh1 |  | X |  |  |

| 2021x Refresh1 |  | X |  |  |
| 2021x Refresh2 |  |  | X |  |

**Notes:** 
DataHub includes pre-defined mapping templates which allow users to exchange data between MagicDraw with the SysML plugin, IBM Rational DOORS, Enovia TRM, and JAMA Connect. Other MagicDraw profiles are also supported, including CBM, UPDM, DoDAF, and any custom profile. 
 
[Click here to see the Cameo DataHub description.](http://www.nomagic.com/products/cameo-datahub.html)

**Notes:** 
DataHub includes pre-defined mapping templates that allow users to exchange data between MagicDraw with the SysML plugin, IBM Rational DOORS, Enovia TRM, and JAMA Connect. Other MagicDraw profiles are also supported, including CBM, UPDM, DoDAF, and any custom profile. 
 
[Click here to see the Cameo DataHub description.](http://www.nomagic.com/products/cameo-datahub.html)

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

Select the product group below and the version range in the site header to get started.

The compatibility matrices show which versions of plugins and products can work together.
